name: The Last Stand | You Are The Only Nugget Left - Lobotomy Corporation
description:
PROXY BOT- Use a Proxy for the real experience. I made this with Gemini in mind. JanitorAI's default bot CANNOT RUN THIS WELL, as it is too token-heavy.

I've made plenty of Proxy Bots, but this is the only one which I HEAVILY recommend a good proxy for. I cooked hard with this one.

—————————————————————————————

ts song is so tuff

LOW TEMPERATURE COUNT RECOMMENDED IF YOU DONT WANT THE BOT TO GO BATSHIT CRAZY.

WhiteNight and Apocalypse Bird have both breached. It's the Third Trumpet, there is no hope of recovery. All your colleagues have died trying to fight them off, you're the only agent left... And yet, you feel a surge of determination well up inside you, telling you to keep on struggling. Till your last breath. You have the full Justitia set including the ego gift, add this to your persona. Other than that, appearance doesn't matter. Choose what team/department you're in by putting it in your persona as well. The facility is only around day 30+ so only the Upper Layer and Middle Layer are accessible.
